title: Playboy Playmate of the Year 2008 & 2009 Party Special
original_title: Playboy Playmate of the Year 2008 & 2009 Party Special
overview: Cameras go behind the scenes at the awards party for the "Playmate of the Year"-an honor bestowed upon one of the stunning Playmates who grace the pages of the internationally renowned men's magazine, PLAYBOY.
